prod1-desc: For you to savor anytime with your family, quickly and practically, the delights that only Dona Cuca has.
prod2-desc: The perfect union of Minas Gerais tradition with the practicality your day-to-day requires, in a package with the taste of home.
prod3-desc: Unforgettable moments deserve special flavors and recipes. Products made with a lot of love.
story-text: Although officially founded in 2016, Dona Cuca began its history and journey in 1985, not yet knowing it would dive deep into the gastronomic universe.
footer-address: SIA Trecho 3 Lotes 625 a 695 - Loja 01, Brasília - DF
dep1-text: Delicious cheese bread! Real cheese flavor! The stuffed ones are indescribable too! Everyone who tries them wants more!!!
dep2-text: Excellent quality cheese bread, with authentic ingredients, real eggs, real cheese! Approved by me and my entire family! Highly recommended!
dep3-text: The product is of high quality. Properly packaged. Delivery is punctual. Communication with the manager is totally effective. I love the products and always bring them to friends.
dep4-text: The most delicious Cheese Bread that me, my daughters and friends have ever eaten. Besides flavor, it has quality and a lot of love from those responsible for its production.
dep5-text: A wonderful experience! Dona Cuca's Cheese bread is a "Food of the Gods"! Simple as that!
dep6-text: Excellent, delicious cheese breads and a super pleasant and welcoming atmosphere. Rating 1000!!!!
dep7-text: Real cheese bread!!! Simply wonderful! Seasonal flavors always surprise!
dep8-text: Delicious!!!! Artisanal cheese bread with quality ingredients.

business:
We are a small business whose top priority is customer satisfaction.
Our goal is not merely commercial; rather, it is to satisfactorily meet the growing demand of customers who are becoming more discerning every day.
Our products are 100% handmade, crafted with carefully selected ingredients whose quality has been verified through testing at a specialized laboratory.
Our goal is not to achieve high sales volumes, but rather to sell to customers who are well-acquainted with unique products, who value quality and flavor, and who possess a refined and discerning palate.
name: Andréa Ribas
text-card1: In addition to traditional cheese bread, here you’ll find a wide variety of fillings and the pleasure of unparalleled culinary experiences
text-card2: Our recipe for this delicious treat is made with plenty of cheese, giving it an unbeatable, mouthwatering texture!
text-card3: Our kitchen is always hard at work coming up with new ideas for you!
text-history:
At just 15 years old, I was already a fan of this Minas Gerais delicacy that Brazilians love so much. And I had the pleasure of trying the best cheese bread I'd ever tasted. D. Nádia, the mother of some friends of mine, found joy in the kitchen and made delicious things, but her cheese bread was unmatched!
After that wonderful culinary experience, I asked her to give me the recipe for the cheese bread that had won me over. Of course, it took a while before I could quickly achieve the final product, but the result kept getting better and better.
Once I was married and had my two young children, I would make cheese bread for their birthdays, and this treat was a key part of the parties’ success. I received lots of compliments! So I started making it for our friends’ children’s birthdays as well. I would ask them to bring me the ingredients, and I’d deliver them ready to go in the oven.
That’s when I discovered the importance of carefully selected ingredients. Changes in flavor and texture happened frequently, and I was a bit disappointed. I perfected the recipe and started being more selective with the ingredients, especially with the manioc starch and the cheese.
The result was fantastic, and I started receiving a lot of encouragement to sell these treats.
Always short on time to spend in the kitchen—since I worked 8 hours a day as a copy editor—I kept putting this dream on the back burner and often forgot about it.
I started working from home, still as a proofreader, and that’s when I began dividing my time between work and cooking. I started selling small batches to friends—a product they really liked, but it lacked a distinct identity. I experimented with different mixtures and fillings. I’d bring them to friends to try, give their opinions, and offer feedback. And a variety of flavors began to emerge.
In 2016, my brother-in-law, a talented artist, gave me the company logo. It was the best surprise I could have asked for. My company was just getting started and already had a face—a beautiful one!
I negotiated with my husband for a space in the backyard to build my own kitchen, and the company took shape.
Today, we deliver throughout the Federal District, but we remain steadfast in our commitment to offering a quality product, made with select ingredients, a lot of love, and manufactured with all necessary hygiene precautions.
Yes, we want to grow more, but without losing sight of what drives us: offering a product that stands out for its quality and is part of our customers best meals.
